scripts.android:sync: pnpm run build && pnpm exec cap sync android
scripts.android:open: pnpm run android:sync && pnpm exec cap open android
scripts.android:run: pnpm run android:sync && pnpm exec cap run android
scripts.ios:sync: pnpm run build && pnpm exec cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: pnpm run ios:sync && pnpm exec cap open ios
scripts.ios:run: pnpm run ios:sync && pnpm exec cap run ios
